description_long: This object is a compact lipstick with a sleek, cylindrical form and a slightly tapered base. The main body is a deep, glossy purple color, while the cap is a shiny black with a smooth, reflective finish. The front of the lipstick features white printed branding and product information, adding a touch of contrast and visual interest. The cap appears to be removable, likely revealing the lipstick product inside. The overall design is modern and elegant, suitable for personal care use in urban environments. The object is small, lightweight, and easily portable, fitting comfortably in a hand or pocket.
description: A sleek, deep purple lipstick with a glossy black cap and white printed branding, featuring a modern and compact design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white printed branding and product information on the purple body, with the glossy black cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal visible text, highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted purple surface and the shiny black cap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain purple body and the cap, with no visible branding or text.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing a partial glimpse of the white text on the purple body and the glossy black cap.
attribute_brand_logo: White printed logo and text on the front of the purple body, in a script and sans-serif style.
attribute_cap_design: Cylindrical, glossy black cap with a smooth, reflective surface and no visible decorative elements.
